creator: thindil@laeran.pl.eu.org
text:
Created attachment 239674
515.86.01

It is a newer version from production branch. It should fix bugs: #268983, #267220 - fix for this bug was backported by Nvidia, according to the changelog, and bug #263475.

The patch to linux-nvidia-libs may need some tests, I didn't test it too long.

Why not the newest production version 525? I have some serious problems with the 520 and 525 series of the driver. I plan to investigate it later, accepting this patch will made my tests easier. ;)
